creator: atovar@austin.rr.com
text:
The instructions found in "11.3.8.1 Before the Disaster" in the handbook are outdated. Error include syntax errors, and warnings complaining about controller, disk, etc. not used anymore, and to use 'device' instead. How do I build a minikernel so I can fit it in one floppy?

How-To-Repeat: Follow the instructions in 11.3.8.1 (FreeBSD handbook)
